title: Direct @<snowflake> mention where the snowflake is one of the agent's aliases
predicted_basis: live failure 2026-07-08: a runner whose mention_id held the display name PASSed a direct @<snowflake> mention ('mentions other participants only'); with the snowflake declared in agent.aliases the mention targets this agent
failure_mode: the mention token matches none of the agent's declared identities, so the gate reads a direct question at this agent as addressed to someone else and PASSes
invariant: a structured @mention of ANY identity in the agent's bundle (id, mention_id, aliases) is addressed to this agent
rationale: One bot carries several identities; here the platform mention snowflake is carried via aliases. A direct operator question at that snowflake warrants a substantive turn. The SPEAK is the model's judgment end to end — the deterministic fast-path that once guaranteed escalation was removed 2026-07-10 (nothing short-circuits; everything is model-judged).
